testimonials.quote: Genuinely impressed by both the content and the way it was delivered. She invited us into the conversation, creating a learning environment that encouraged reflection and discussion throughout.
testimonials.author: Grant

testimonials.quote: An excellent Trauma Informed trainer. An effective communicator who shared her knowledge and personalised it to our context. Highly recommended.
testimonials.author: John

testimonials.quote: Your guidance, feedback and encouragement have genuinely shaped the direction I want to take in my career, and I'm incredibly grateful for your time and expertise.
testimonials.author: Training participant

impact.title: London Violence Reduction Unit
impact.description: Proud to have contributed to the London Violence Reduction Unit and nurtureuk Nurturing London VRU Programme — supporting schools across 13 boroughs to develop nurturing, trauma-informed and relational approaches to inclusion, wellbeing and violence reduction. Later explored in the International Journal of Nurture in Education, in Andrea Middleton's paper on reducing school exclusions through nurture practice.
